title: KOSTA 2026 같이 가실분!
body:
다들 주일 마무리 잘 하고 계신가요!
6월 29일 - 7월 2일 Wheaton College, IL에서 KOSTA가 진행됩니다!

같이 가실 분 저한테 연락주시고 5월 10일 전까지 신청해주시면 됩니다 :)
3박4일이 길게 느껴질 수도, 가격이 비싸다 생각될 수도 있지만 앞으로 남은 몇십년 인생이 변화될 수 있는 기회라 생각하면 이정도는 정말 아무것도 아니지 않을까요!

미 전역에서 수백명의 청년들이 모이는 자리인만큼 새로운 만남과 인연들도 있고, 교회에서 150달러도 지원해주신다 하시니 같이 갑시다~~

https://www.kostausa.org/

title: AR 실험 참가자 모집
body:
Happy May! I would like to share an exciting research participation opportunity with you.
A research team at Texas A&M University is currently recruiting undergraduate students (ages 18–26) for a 1-hour Augmented Reality (AR) study on campus. This study explores how virtual campus environments influence environmental perceptions and activity preferences.
Incentive: Participants will receive a $40 gift card after completing the session.
Important Notes:
Only 15 participants will be accepted (first-come, first-served).
Some spots have already been filled, so I encourage you to respond as soon as possible if you are interested.
If you need vision correction, contact lenses are required (regular glasses cannot be used with the AR device)
Sign-up link: https://tamu.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_d5qTfbG2iUOfCMS


Sessions are expected to begin next week, and participants will be contacted in the order they complete the survey.
If you have any questions, you may contact the research team directly using the information provided in the recruitment letter at HealthyAging65@tamu.edu or 1-979-473-9422.
Thank you, and I hope some of you can take advantage of this opportunity! Wishing you a wonderful weekend ahead!
Warm regards,
